generalTips: Crouch-walk and break line of sight — most Ex-Pop lose you within seconds once they can't see you.
Lockers and under-beds reset a chase, but a Pouncer may be hiding in dark spots — shine your light first.
Loot side rooms for batteries, lockpicks and meds before triggering loud objectives (generators, alarms).
Save your rig for grab-escapes and Prime Asset encounters, not trash mobs.
In co-op, split roles: one handles the noisy objective while the others scout and peel enemies.

trials.name: Kill the Snitch
trials.goal: False witnesses must not be allowed to spread their false truths. Take the Snitch to the execution chamber and silence his lies.
objectives: Start the Generators in the Basement
Open the Execution Room Gate (Introductory difficulty)
tips: The Snitch is pushed to his death — protect the slow, exposed push route.
Basement generators are loud; clear nearby enemies first or post a watcher.
The Skinner Man stalks here — keep a locker or window in reach while looting the security room.

trials.name: Cancel the Autopsy
trials.goal: Corpses offer forensic facts incompatible with our truth. Grind the bodies into factually correct slurry.
objectives: Find Keys to Release Agents to their deaths

trials.name: Sabotage the Lockdown
trials.goal: If you can open doors, no prison can hold you. Power the generator to enable your escape.

trials.name: Release the Prisoners
trials.goal: Only Murkoff arbitrates justice; free the convicts falsely imprisoned for their conspicuous guilt.
objectives: Reach the Security Room to free the Prisoners

trials.name: Teach the Police Officer
trials.goal: Teach the Police Officer is the fourth MK-Challenge that takes place at the Police Station in The Outlast Trials.

trials.name: Eliminate the Past
trials.goal: Destroy as many of the historical records as you can within the allotted time. The more you eradicate, the less we punish.

trials.name: Seize the Narcotics
trials.goal: You are the controlled substance. The law enslaves minds by caging bodies. You destroy bodies and liberate minds, making users more desperate for control. Find the narcotics and set yourself free.
objectives: Open the prison door to escape

trials.name: Cleanse the Orphans
trials.goal: Education establishes obedience and Faith makes it manifest. Teach the children, give them First Communion, and make them ours.
objectives: Tune Radio Receivers in the Dorms
Stop the Blasphemers in the Chapel
tips: You're defenceless while carrying an orphan — scout and clear the route first.
Leland Coyle charges with an electrified baton; bait the charge near cover, then break away.
Use the chapel basement and second floor to shake chases.

trials.name: Feed the Children
trials.goal: A healthy body makes for a healthy mind. Provide the Children with the nutrition they deserve.
objectives: Finish the soup of the day
Serve the Soup in the Cafeteria

trials.name: Foster the Orphans
trials.goal: Save the children from Mother Gooseberry and lead them to their new foster home.
objectives: Adjust the Frequencies to Unlock the Lobby Gate

trials.name: Gather the Children of God
trials.goal: Too much mother-love makes a weak child. Gather the Children and bring them to the priest for a more strenuous education.

trials.name: Reunite the Family
trials.goal: The nuclear family is the societal ideal. Release the orphan from the shackles of the state and reunite him with mother and father.

trials.name: Grind the Bad Apples
trials.goal: Grind the Bad Apples is a Trial that takes place at the Fun Park in The Outlast Trials.
objectives: Get access to the Root Canal Ride
tips: The Root Canal boat ride is the hub — power off the barriers, then push the boat together.
Sightlines are wide open; hug stalls and rides for cover.
Group up before the boat push so a hunter can't pick off a straggler.

trials.name: Punish the Miscreants
trials.goal: Naughty children can only learn obedience through punishment. Teach the children to behave.
objectives: Find and Grind the Bad Children

trials.name: Open the Gates
trials.goal: You cannot let power imprison you. Disconnect the electric gates and make your escape.
objectives: Open the Gates to Reach the Exit

trials.name: Drill the Futterman
trials.goal: People are not toys, stop Mother Gooseberry from making a human Dr. Futterman.
objectives: Kill Mr. Futterman in Gooseberry's Office

trials.name: Deface the Futtermans
trials.goal: Childhood memories are the stagnation that impede your growth. Put away the childish things that clutter your mind.

trials.name: Redeem your Freedom
trials.goal: Currency, like your survival, is worthless unless you give it value with faith. Collect tickets like your life depended on it.

trials.name: Beguile the Children
trials.goal: Beguile the Children is the sixth MK-Challenge that takes place at the Fun Park in The Outlast Trials.
objectives: Find the codes to modify the messages

trials.name: Win the Truth
trials.goal: You are the blind observer, who consumes screen-fed ignorance and swells with the genius of idiot artifice. Regurgitate the knowledge that brings suffering to the wise, win the game which only punishes the defeated, and we will let you out.

trials.name: Pervert the Futterman
trials.goal: We cannot allow secret messages and innuendo to brainwash our children; expose and humiliate the hidden deviant, then destroy him.
tips: Machinery noise masks enemy audio — rely on sight and the X-Ray rig.
Mother Gooseberry's gas lingers; never fight or loot inside it.
Long trial — bank meds and batteries between objectives.

trials.name: Crush the Sex Toys
trials.goal: Discreet packaging hides dangerous perversion. Shine a light to expose the boxes of sex toys, then crush them with industrial force.

trials.name: Incinerate the Sex Toys
trials.goal: Perversion on an industrial scale ferments widespread corruption and disobedience. Push the production carts of sex dolls into the incinerator and burn the sickness.
objectives: Push the Carts into the Incinerator

trials.name: Shutdown the Factory
trials.goal: Murkoff controls the means of production; use the emergency breaks to shut down the factory.

trials.name: Fumigate the Factory
trials.goal: Aging workers with their pensions and benefits are the bleeding wounds of our economy, draining the corporate body with their chronic existence. Stop the bleeding with a sterilizing gas and put the workers out of our misery.

trials.name: Flatten the Foreman
trials.goal: Section A

layouts.label: Tilt The Scales of Justice Map

trials.name: Vindicate the Guilty
trials.goal: We cannot allow our innocent institutions to be persecuted for their clear guilt. Sabotage the proceedings, silence the witnesses, and revoke the authority of the judge.
objectives: Drop the Evidence in the Fountain
Gather Acid and pour into the Fountain
tips: Multi-floor — use the lobby and second-floor layouts to plan routes between objectives.
The scales-of-justice area is a chokepoint; clear it before committing.
Courtrooms echo — move during ambient noise to mask your steps.

trials.name: Escape the Courthouse
trials.goal: Escape the Courthouse is the first MK-Challenge that takes place at the Courthouse in The Outlast Trials.

trials.name: Destroy the Evidence
trials.goal: If there is no evidence, there is no crime. Destroy the proof of our mistakes, and then we never did anything wrong.
objectives: Pour Acid to Dissolve the Body in the Courtroom

trials.name: Tilt the Scales of Justice
trials.goal: Can real evidence of false crimes outweigh the power of corrupting wealth? Load the scales of Lady Justice and observe.
objectives: Present the Head to Lady Justice

trials.name: Fuel the Release
trials.goal: Justice, like civilization, requires power, and power requires fuel. Carry the fuel, power the court, and secure your liberty.

trials.name: Sentence the Prosecuted
trials.goal: They call it a "sentence" because a few choice words can condemn a human to death. Decipher the charges, pin it to the defendant, and make sure that it sticks.

trials.name: Bribe the Judges
trials.goal: You are the master, whose property is the purpose of the law. Salary reminds enforcement that their monopoly of violence only exists for your monopoly of capital. Collect the bribes, pay the judges, and we will let you out.

trials.name: Kill the Politician
trials.goal: At the intersection of commerce and politics stands an unholy union meant to lull you into a false sense of security and control. Vote with your wallet, and show the world what you stand for.
objectives: Gain Access to the Main Plaza
Use the Ticket to Enter the Event
tips: Big open mall floors — use shops and escalators to break line of sight.
Track the politician's patrol and isolate him from nearby enemies.
Mind the long sightlines on the atrium; cross them only when clear.

trials.name: Investigate the Minotaur
trials.goal: Investigate the Minotaur is the first MK-Challenge that takes place at the Shopping Mall in The Outlast Trials.
objectives: Find evidence in the Spatlin store
Deliver the evidence to the journalist

trials.name: Fabricate the Scandal
trials.goal: Fabricate the Scandal is the second MK-Challenge that takes place at the Shopping Mall in The Outlast Trials.

trials.name: Pleasure the Prosecutor
trials.goal: Pleasure the Prosecutor is a Trial that takes place at the Downtown in The Outlast Trials.
objectives: Find and Install the Sadist Mannequin
tips: Street-level with long sightlines — move building to building, off the open road.
Use alleys and interiors to rotate around patrols.
Watch for Pushers funnelling you into the open with gas.

trials.name: Kidnap the Mistress
trials.goal: Prostitutes receive more honest confessions than priests. Identify the pervert by his tastes, kidnap his dominatrix, deliver her for interrogation, and we will let you out.
objectives: Discover clues by turning on radio frequencies
Use clues to locate and return the right mannequin

trials.name: Spread the Disease
trials.goal: Sexually transmitted diseases are the secret handshake of evolutionary judgement and divine retribution. Spread the infection, and we will let you out.

trials.name: Traffick the Product
trials.goal: Traffick the Product is the third MK-Challenge that takes place at the Downtown in The Outlast Trials.
objectives: Complete the first Drug Deal on Franco's turf

trials.name: Liquidate the Union
trials.goal: Human labor is the backbone of liberty and profit. We cannot allow the vanity of self-preservation to threaten production. Cross the picket line, persuade labor to resume production, and liquify the union.
objectives: Find the Union Boss In the Mansion
Find a way to Open the Panic Room
Escort the Union Boss to the Factory
tips: Spread-out houses — clear each before grabbing objectives.
Ambushes happen between yards; cross gaps deliberately, not on a sprint.
Keep an escape house in mind for when a hunter locks on.

trials.name: Get Out the Vote
trials.goal: The illusion of choice is the pretext that makes obedience feel like liberty. Do your part for the dream of democracy.
objectives: Find and Cast the Missing Votes
Return the Candidate to the School

trials.name: Disrupt the Neighborhood
trials.goal: Communities that erect their own gates determine their own boundaries. Remove the obstacles and invite intrusion. No fences make interesting neighbors.
objectives: Open the gates to reach the Exit

trials.name: Eliminate the Legacy
trials.goal: Children born to wealth are the inbred bastards of greed and corruption, cheating at even the games for idiot children, drooling at the teat of avarice. Match the symbols, eliminate the legacy, and we will let you out.

trials.name: Silence the Idol
trials.goal: You are the electric eye, the ravenous panopticon that births and consumes with the same razor-toothed orifice. Tear, burn, and crush the face of false charisma, and we will let you out.
objectives: Setup the scene on the Studio floor
Find codes and use them on the switchboard
tips: Studio sets are maze-like — learn the loops to lose hunters.
Stage lighting creates dark pockets where Pouncers lurk; light them up.
Use prop cover, but don't get cornered on a closed set.

trials.name: Cancel the Broadcast
trials.goal: You are the butcher, who reminds the sheep the ultimate path of all flesh, no matter the bounty of wealth or the wealth of spirit. Sabotage the broadcast, defile the faithful with blood, and we will let you out.

trials.name: Poison the Medicine
trials.goal: In a godless world, opiates will be the religion of the masses. Take control of drug production, and you can kill with the nonchalance of a god.
objectives: Push Cart to the Train Depot for Refilling
Deliver the Cart to the Laboratory
Add Poison from the Chemical Storage
Cut and Package the Poisoned Drugs
Hide the Drugs in the Cargo Hold
tips: Franco 'Il Bambino' bullies tight spaces — keep to looping, vertical routes near the water.
Don't get cornered against the docks edge.
Save a rig charge to break his grab and reset the chase.

trials.name: Empty the Vault
trials.goal: Casinos are the temple of idiot waste and willful failure; steal from those who would steal from you.
objectives: Find the Codes to Unlock the Vault

trials.name: Poison the Cattle
trials.goal: The milk of human kindness must be contaminated with liberty and progress. Poison the cattle and spoil their milk.

trials.name: Stash the Contraband
trials.goal: Economies based on narcotics crumble without their primary market. Steal the drugs, hide them securely, and we will let you out.
objectives: Hide the Drugs in Franco's Barrels

trials.name: Cook the Informant
trials.goal: Nobody can resist interrogation by torture, and any manner of death is mercy. Microwave the informant, burst his head, and we will let you out.

trials.name: Despoil the Auction
trials.goal: Despoil the Auction is a Trial that takes place at the Resort in The Outlast Trials.
objectives: Cover the Rest of the Balance
tips: Season 5 trial — Liliya Bogomolova keeps relentless pressure; prioritise objectives over hiding.
Rotate cover constantly and keep two exits open.
Bank resources before the auction-floor objectives.

trials.name: Solve the Murder
trials.goal: You are the fetishist, whose obsession with the totems of violence allows you to define more convenient truths. Find the evidence to condemn our chosen killer, and we will let you out.
objectives: Identify the Killer, Weapon, and Crime Scene

trials.name: Incinerate the Relic
trials.goal: You are the heretic and you are the zealot. Relics are the proof of an impossible gospel, the belief that makes whole the deservedly slaughtered lamb. Pay your way into heaven, incinerate the relic, and we will let you out.
objectives: Find gems to buy the first key

trials.name: Escape
trials.goal: Escape is a temporary Trial in The Outlast Trials where Reagents try to flee the Sinyala Facility through the Waste Tunnel.
tips: Linear escape — keep moving, don't stop to fight.
Use the tunnels' tight turns to shake pursuers.
Push through as a group so no one is left behind a closing gap.

trials.name: Escape the Lies
trials.goal: Escape the Lies is the first MK-Challenge that takes place at the Waste Tunnel in The Outlast Trials.
objectives: Escort Amelia's loyalists to the incinerators
trials.prime: Mother GooseberryLeland CoyleFranco BarbiOtto and Arora KressLiliya Bogomolova
